title: benstonea rupestris
intro: Benstonea rupestris, also known as the limestone benstonea or limestone Benstonea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Triuridaceae, native to New Caledonia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Benstonea rupestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and improve wound healing. Benstonea rupestris is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, and is also used in some modern herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
